history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian man with black, curly hair and glasses stands in front of an orange metal gate at night. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a blue graphic print that reads "INSANE STRANGE" and features a portrait of a person, along with blue patterned sleeves. He is also wearing white track pants with thin black stripes down the sides and white athletic shoes. His right hand is raised, forming a peace sign near his face, and his left hand is in his pocket. The gate is covered in graffiti, with a large red graffiti tag on the left and white spray paint markings on the right. Behind the gate, a brick wall and some foliage are visible, along with streetlights casting a dim glow. The overall mood is urban and slightly gritty, with the artificial lighting creating a contrast between light and shadow. The color palette is dominated by the orange of the gate, the white of the man's outfit, and the dark tones of the night. The style is casual, street-style fashion.
